alkylation reagent: alkylated using 20 mM iodoacetamide at pH 7.0
alkylation concentration: alkylated using 20 mM iodoacetamide at pH 7.0
enrichment method: with a His-tag for affinity purification
fragmentation method: Fragmentation of peptides was by higher-energy CID
instrument: linked to a mass spectrometry (Orbitrap Elite, Thermo Scientific Inc)
labeling: the relative ligase activities were analyzed by mass spectrometry based on the formation of the cyclic peptide GLYRRGRLYRRN.
